name: Garides Kokkiyia Me Feta (Shrimp & Feta in Sh
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Chopped fresh basil or dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the shrimp. Wash and drain, then sprinkle lightly with lemon juice.
2. Heat the oil or butter in a frying pan. Cook the onion until soft.
3. Add the tomato sauce, chopped tomatoes, herbs, garlic, and salt and pepper to taste. Simmer for 25 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and strain.
5. Butter large scallops or other shells, or individual ovenproof dishes. Spoon a little sauce into each.
6. Fill with the shrimp and spoon the sauce over. Crumble the feta cheese on top.
7. Set in a baking pan and bake for 15-20 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or until the shrimp is cooked through and the cheese melted.
8. Garnish with fresh basil or parsley and serve hot.
From: "The Food of Greece" by Vilma Liacouras, Avenel Books, New York. Typed for you by Karen Mintzias.
